reviews.comment:
Buena atención como es sabido del ACA, solo que es muy chica, no tiene playón de estacionamiento y en temporada veraniega no alcanza el acceso existente por lo que los vehículos hacen fila sobre la ruta.

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, as is typical of ACA, but it's very small, doesn't have a parking lot, and in the summer season the existing access is insufficient, so vehicles line up on the road.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoN3JXclR3EAE
